name: code_review_agent
description: A code review agent that detects code smells, identifies security vulnerabilities, and calculates cyclomatic complexity metrics for Python and other languages.

skills.name: Code Smell Detection
skills.description: Identify structural code quality issues such as long functions, magic numbers, too many parameters, missing docstrings, and TODO markers.
examples: Review this Python function for code smells
Does this code have any quality issues?
Check if my function is too long or complex

skills.name: Security Pattern Analysis
skills.description: Scan code for hardcoded credentials, SQL injection, shell injection, eval/exec usage, insecure deserialization, and SSL verification bypass.
examples: Is there a security vulnerability in this code?
Check this snippet for SQL injection risks
Does this code have any hardcoded secrets?

skills.name: Complexity Metrics
skills.description: Compute cyclomatic complexity, function count, class count, and line count for Python code, with a maintainability rating.
examples: What is the cyclomatic complexity of this function?
How complex is this Python module?
Calculate the maintainability metrics for my code
